title: ehrharta longifolia
intro: Ehrharta longifolia, also known as Pukapuka grass, is a species of grass native to New Zealand. The plant is traditionally used in Maori medicine, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Ehrharta longifolia include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Ehrharta longifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
